philosophy: Zero-Doc: Files flow to canonical locations automatically; organization is artifact of flow, not separate activity

phase_1_immediate.description: Demo prep - eliminate root pools, consolidate duplicates

moves.note: Need V to clarify: which business context for each note in Notes/?

phase_2_infrastructure.description: Build Zero-Doc flow automation (post-demo, not executing now)

components.purpose: Assess all files at root; auto-route to canonical locations via anchors.json
Pre-flight check on mkdir/touch; validate against anchors.json; reject non-canonical
Nightly scan for anti-patterns; generate violations.json; surface in daily digest
Cleanup Records/Temporary (>48hrs) and flag Document Inbox/Temporary (>7days)

config_updates.purpose: Canonical path registry for all routing decisions

phase_3_modular_flows.description: Self-contained flow modules with AIR pattern (future, stubs only)

air_stages.assess: Detect .pdf/.docx with 'resume'/'CV' content; extract candidate name
air_stages.review: Daily digest with auto-filed count; spot-check sample

air_stages.assess: Transcribe audio/text; detect attendees/context keywords; classify business (Careerspan/Personal/Other)
air_stages.intervene: Route to {Business}/Meetings/{Date}_{Person}_{Topic}.md; extract action items to Lists/
air_stages.review: Daily digest with classification confidence; V confirms or corrects

air_stages.assess: Detect .log files; parse origin script from filename/content
air_stages.review: Weekly digest with error flagging; V reviews critical errors only

orchestration.purpose: Coordinate all flow modules; aggregate review queues; maintain flow audit log

phase_4_review_rhythms.description: Maintenance > Organization - review flows, not files (future, stubs only)

cadences.content: file_flow_router decisions + hygiene violations + classification confirmations
Flow health report (routing accuracy, pool detection, stuck files) + review all flagged items
Gestalt evaluation: what's pooling? what needs new channels? module performance? flow redesign?

scheduled_tasks_stub.note: NOT creating scheduled tasks yet - just planning structure

tasks.name: file-hygiene-nightly
tasks.instruction: Run N5/scripts/file_hygiene_detector.py; generate violations.json; email if critical issues found

tasks.name: file-flow-router-daemon
tasks.instruction: Run N5/scripts/file_flow_router.py; scan root for new files; auto-route via anchors.json; log to file_flow_log.jsonl
tasks.note: Daemon preferred over scheduled task for real-time responsiveness

tasks.name: temporary-ttl-cleanup
tasks.instruction: Run N5/scripts/temporary_ttl_enforcer.py; clean Records/Temporary >48hrs; flag Document Inbox/Temporary >7days

zero_doc_principles_applied: Flow vs Pools - eliminate root pool, create flow channels with TTL
Organization Step Shouldn't Exist - file_flow_router does it automatically
AIR Pattern - modular flows implement Assess → Intervene → Review
Maintenance > Organization - review rhythms replace manual filing
Platform Orchestration - self-contained modules with command-layer intersection
Minimal Touch - V approves, system operates

rollback.method: Reverse all moves via this JSON; git revert for config changes
rollback.safety: All moves logged to file_flow_log.jsonl with timestamps
